locations.name: Redwood Library
locations.description: Main university library with study spaces, computer labs, and research archives.

locations.name: Hawthorne Science Hall
locations.description: Modern science classrooms and laboratories for engineering and physics students.

locations.name: Oakwood Student Canteen
locations.description: Large dining hall serving breakfast, lunch, and dinner for students and staff.

locations.name: Evergreen Sports Complex
locations.description: Indoor sports arena with basketball courts, gym facilities, and fitness studios.

locations.name: Maple Administration Center
locations.description: Administrative offices including admissions, finance, and student services.

locations.name: Cedar Lecture Theatre
locations.description: Large lecture halls equipped with smart presentation technology.

locations.name: Willow Café
locations.description: Casual campus café offering coffee, snacks, and quick meals.

locations.name: Pine Learning Commons
locations.description: Collaborative study area with meeting rooms and digital media equipment.
